revision.comment: Trappist the monk moved page [[Module:Sandbox/trappist the monk/Ibox zh/data]] to [[Module:Infobox multi-lingual name/data]] without leaving a redirect: get it out of the sandbox

Protected "[[Module:Infobox multi-lingual name/data]]": match the template that this module replaces; ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1325043065|1325043065]] by [[Special:Contributions/Zackmann08|Zackmann08]] ([[User talk:Zackmann08|talk]]) not a subject of the [[Wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/Log/2025_November_13#Rename_Infobox_Chinese_subpages|tfd]];
